changes_made: Changed k8s_storage_class_backup_policy_defined to k8s_storageclass_backup_policy_defined for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions are relevant to the control CP-6(1) as they address the need for backup configurations in Kubernetes, which aligns with ensuring data availability and separation from the primary site. The naming conventions mostly follow the pattern, but a minor adjustment was needed for consistency.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent use of 'storageclass' as a single word to align with Kubernetes resource naming conventions.
title: Alternate Storage Site - Alternate storage site | separation from primary site identify an alternate stor
step1_reasoning: The control CP-6(1) focuses on ensuring that there is an alternate storage site with separation from the primary site, which translates in Kubernetes to ensuring that data stored in etcd and persistent volumes are backed up and can be restored in case of primary site failure. This involves configuring backups for etcd and persistent volumes, as well as defining backup policies for storage classes.
